question: Will the Economic Policy Uncertainty Index for the US have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-04-27?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/USEPUINDXD once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-04-27 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-04-17) was 434.940. (The latest value released in Economic Policy Uncertainty Index for United States from the release Economic Policy Uncertainty.)
background:
The notes from the release: N/A.  The notes from the series: The daily news-based Economic Policy Uncertainty Index is based on newspapers in the United States.

For additional details, including an analysis of the performance of the model, see Baker, Scott, Nicholas Bloom and Steven Davis (2012), "Measuring Economic Policy Uncertainty" (http://www.policyuncertainty.com/media/BakerBloomDavis.pdf).  Additional background of the series:  1. the units of the series: Index.  2. the seasonal adjustments of the series:  Not Seasonally Adjusted  3. the update frequency: Daily, 7-Day
